title: Webhook unregistered after server restart
symptom: After restarting the n8n server, the webhook becomes unregistered, leading to requests not being triggered. The error message indicates that the webhook is unknown.
not_this_if: Webhook is registered and functioning without server restarts
root_cause: When n8n is restarted, it may not properly re-register webhooks if the workflows are not activated again. This can happen due to issues in the startup sequence or configuration settings.
fix_steps: After restarting the n8n server, go to the workflow settings.
Deactivate the workflow and then reactivate it.
Check the logs to ensure the webhook is registered.
agent_instruction: Deactivate and reactivate the workflow after a server restart to re-register the webhook.
